Custom Hoodie Manufacturing — Your Design, Any Size

Updated: July 1, 2026 | By FABRIOZA

Hoodies are the cornerstone of every streetwear brand, gym line, and corporate uniform program. At FABRIOZA, we manufacture custom hoodies from 50 pieces per style with your choice of fabric weight, construction method, and customization technique. ISO 9001 certified quality, factory-direct from Pakistan.

Custom Hoodie Fabric Options

GSMFabric TypeBest ForFeel
280gsmLightweight French TerryLayering, gym wear, warm climatesSoft, breathable
320gsmMid-Weight FleeceAll-purpose, retail brandsCozy, structured
360gsmHeavyweight FleecePremium streetwear, winterThick, substantial
400gsmUltra-HeavyweightLuxury brands, oversized fitsDense, premium

Customization Techniques

Embroidery

3D puff embroidery creates raised, textured logos that feel premium and last forever. Flat embroidery offers clean, classic branding. Chain stitch adds vintage character. Our Tajima and Barudan multi-head machines achieve 0.1mm precision on every piece.

Screen Printing

Water-based inks for soft-hand prints that feel part of the fabric. Plastisol for vibrant, opaque colors. Discharge printing for vintage washed effects on dark garments.

Puff Print

The streetwear favorite — raised, textured ink that creates a 3D effect. Perfect for bold logos and statement designs on heavyweight hoodies.

Hoodie Styles We Manufacture

  • Pullover Hoodies: Classic kangaroo pocket, drawstring hood
  • Zip-Up Hoodies: Full-zip and half-zip options
  • Crop Hoodies: Trending women's fit, raw hem
  • Oversized Hoodies: Boxy fit, dropped shoulders, heavy GSM
  • Athletic Hoodies: Performance fabrics, thumb holes, sleek fit
  • Custom Cut & Sew: Any design you can sketch
50
Pieces MOQ
280-400
GSM Range
5-7
Days Sample
2-3
Weeks Production

Quality Standards

Every hoodie passes double-needle stitching inspection, drawstring durability testing, zipper smoothness checks (on zip-ups), and wash-testing for shrinkage (max 5%). Fabric is pre-shrunk before cutting to ensure consistent sizing.

Ready to manufacture your hoodie line? Get a free quote from FABRIOZA in 24 hours.

Join 500+ brands. Free mockup. Free sample. Quote in 24 hours. Your design is 100% confidential.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the minimum order for custom hoodies?

50 pieces per style. You can mix sizes (XS-5XL) and colors within the 50-piece minimum.

What GSM should I choose for my hoodie brand?

320gsm is the most popular for retail brands. 400gsm is best for premium/oversized streetwear. 280gsm works well for athletic/gym hoodies.

Can you do puff print on hoodies?

Yes, puff printing is one of our specialties. It works best on 320gsm+ hoodies and creates a raised, textured effect.

Do you offer custom drawstrings and hardware?

Yes, metal-tipped drawstrings, custom aglets, and branded eyelets are all available.

How much do custom hoodies cost?

Prices range from $12-25/unit depending on GSM, customization, and order quantity. Contact us for an exact quote.
